  <script type="application/ld+json">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[{"@type":"Question","name":"What is Claude SEO?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Claude SEO is a free, open-source AI SEO audit tool that runs inside Claude Code. It ships 25 sub-skills, 18 subagents, and 3 extensions covering technical SEO (9 categories), content quality (E-E-A-T per Sept 2025 Quality Rater Guidelines), Schema.org markup, AI search optimization (GEO for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity), local SEO (Google Business Profile, citations, reviews), maps intelligence, semantic topic clustering, search experience optimization (SXO), drift monitoring, e-commerce SEO, and strategic planning. MIT licensed with 7,000+ GitHub stars. It is a free alternative to paid SEO tools for developers who work in the terminal."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How do I install Claude SEO?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"On Unix, macOS, or Linux: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-seo.git then bash claude-seo/install.sh. On Windows: git clone then powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File claude-seo\\install.ps1. Requires Python 3.10+ and Claude Code CLI."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Is Claude SEO free?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Yes. Claude SEO is fully open source under the MIT license with no paid tiers. Optional extensions like DataForSEO (live SERP and keyword data) and Banana (AI image generation via Google Gemini) require separate API keys from those services."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What does the SEO Health Score measure?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"The SEO Health Score is a weighted 0-100 aggregate across 7 categories: Content Quality (23%), Technical SEO (22%), On-Page SEO (20%), Schema/Structured Data (10%), Performance including Core Web Vitals with INP (10%), AI Search Readiness (10%), and Images (5%). Each audit produces a prioritized action plan with Critical, High, Medium, and Low severity levels."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"Which industries does Claude SEO support?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Claude SEO auto-detects 5 business types from homepage signals: SaaS (pricing pages, feature lists, documentation), Local Service (phone numbers, addresses, service areas), E-commerce (product pages, shopping carts), Publisher (blogs, articles, author pages), and Agency (case studies, portfolios, client logos). Recommendations are tailored per detected industry type."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What is GEO and how does Claude SEO optimize for it?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) prepares content for AI-powered search engines. Claude SEO checks AI crawler access (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot), llms.txt compliance, passage-level citability, and brand mention signals. It scores optimization for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT web search, Perplexity, and Bing Copilot."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"What MCP integrations are available?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Claude SEO integrates with MCP servers including official Ahrefs (@ahrefs/mcp) and Semrush servers, plus community servers for Google Search Console, PageSpeed Insights, and DataForSEO. The DataForSEO extension adds 22 commands across 9 API modules for live SERP, keyword, backlink, and AI visibility data."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"How does Claude SEO compare to Ahrefs and Semrush?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Claude SEO is a free, open-source alternative to paid SEO tools like Ahrefs ($99/mo), Semrush ($117/mo), and SE Ranking ($52/mo). It runs in your terminal via Claude Code with no browser or SaaS subscription. It spawns 9 parallel subagents during audits for simultaneous analysis. Unlike web-based SEO tools, it generates JSON-LD schema markup, validates against current Google requirements, and optimizes for AI search engines including Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, and Perplexity. Free and open source under MIT license."}}]}</script>

  <style>
    *,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}html{scroll-behavior:smooth;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;scroll-snap-type:y proximity;-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;text-size-adjust:100%;overflow-x:hidden}
    /* iOS tap highlight + safe area */
    body{-webkit-tap-highlight-color:rgba(224,120,80,.15)}
    :root{--coral:#E07850;--coral-hover:#c4623a;--orange:#FF6B35;--bg:#0A0A0A;--surface:#111111;--surface2:#1A1A1A;--text:#F5F5F0;--text-gray:#888888;--text-muted:#8a8a8a;--text-dim:#878787;--border:#2D2D2D;--border-subtle:#1D1D1D;--green:#4ADE80;--blue:#60A5FA;--rose:#F43F5E;--amber:#F0A830;--grotesk:'Space Grotesk',system-ui,sans-serif;--mono:'IBM Plex Mono','JetBrains Mono',monospace}
    body{font-family:var(--mono);background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);overflow-x:hidden;min-height:100%}
    a{color:var(--coral);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s}a:hover{color:var(--orange)}a:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--coral);outline-offset:3px}::selection{background:rgba(224,120,80,.3)}img{max-width:100%;height:auto;display:block}
    .wrap{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px}.section{padding:100px 0;scroll-snap-align:start}

    /* NAV */
    .nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;height:60px;transition:all .3s;border-bottom:1px solid transparent;padding-top:env(safe-area-inset-top,0)}
    .nav.scrolled{background:rgba(10,10,10,.96);border-bottom-color:#1E1E1E}
    .nav-inner{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:100%}
    .nav-brand{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-weight:700;font-size:14px;color:var(--text);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;letter-spacing:1px}
    .nav-dot{width:12px;height:12px;background:var(--coral)}
    .nav-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:28px}
    .nav-link{font-size:10px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .15s;position:relative;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;font-family:var(--mono);padding:4px 0;min-height:44px;display:flex;align-items:center}
    .nav-link:hover,.nav-link.active{color:var(--coral)}
    .nav-link::after{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;bottom:-3px;height:1.5px;width:0;background:var(--coral);transition:width .3s}
    .nav-link.active::after{width:100%}
    .nav-cta{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:transparent;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.25);cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s}
    .nav-cta:hover{border-color:var(--coral);background:rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
    .nav-cta svg{width:17px;height:17px;fill:#fff}
    .hamburger{display:none;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;width:44px;height:44px;position:relative}
    .hamburger span{display:block;width:20px;height:1.5px;background:var(--text);position:absolute;left:12px;transition:all .3s}
    .hamburger span:nth-child(1){top:16px}.hamburger span:nth-child(2){top:21px}.hamburger span:nth-child(3){top:26px}
    .hamburger.open span:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(5px) rotate(45deg)}.hamburger.open span:nth-child(2){opacity:0}.hamburger.open span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-5px) rotate(-45deg)}
    .mobile-drawer{display:none;position:fixed;top:60px;left:0;right:0;background:var(--bg);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);z-index:99;max-height:0;overflow:hidden;transition:max-height .3s}
    .mobile-drawer.open{max-height:400px}
    .mobile-drawer a{display:flex;align-items:center;padding:16px 24px;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;border-top:1px solid var(--border-subtle);min-height:48px}

    /* COLLAB CURSORS */
    @keyframes cursor-crawler{0%{transform:translate(8vw,5vh)}15%{transform:translate(38vw,22vh)}30%{transform:translate(60vw,45vh)}50%{transform:translate(25vw,70vh)}65%{transform:translate(50vw,35vh)}80%{transform:translate(15vw,15vh)}100%{transform:translate(8vw,5vh)}}
    @keyframes cursor-auditor{0%{transform:translate(65vw,10vh)}20%{transform:translate(18vw,40vh)}40%{transform:translate(50vw,65vh)}55%{transform:translate(70vw,20vh)}75%{transform:translate(30vw,55vh)}90%{transform:translate(55vw,8vh)}100%{transform:translate(65vw,10vh)}}
    @keyframes cursor-indexer{0%{transform:translate(35vw,60vh)}18%{transform:translate(12vw,25vh)}35%{transform:translate(55vw,8vh)}52%{transform:translate(28vw,50vh)}70%{transform:translate(68vw,72vh)}85%{transform:translate(42vw,35vh)}100%{transform:translate(35vw,60vh)}}
    @keyframes cursor-ranker{0%{transform:translate(75vw,45vh)}12%{transform:translate(30vw,10vh)}30%{transform:translate(10vw,55vh)}48%{transform:translate(60vw,75vh)}65%{transform:translate(48vw,18vh)}82%{transform:translate(20vw,62vh)}100%{transform:translate(75vw,45vh)}}
    .collab-cursors{position:absolute;inset:0;overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none;z-index:20}
    .cc{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;will-change:transform}
    .cc svg{filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.7))}
    .cc-tag{position:absolute;left:14px;top:14px;padding:2px 8px;font-family:monospace;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.08em;white-space:nowrap;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.5)}

    /* PIXEL DIVIDER */
    .pixel-div{display:flex;width:100%}.pixel-div div{flex:1;height:4px}

    /* HERO */
    .hero{position:relative;min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:120px 0 80px;scroll-snap-align:start;overflow:hidden}
    .hero-content{position:relative;z-index:10;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;gap:32px;width:100%}
    .hero-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;height:32px;padding:0 16px;background:var(--surface2);border:1px solid var(--border);max-width:100%;overflow:hidden}
    .hero-badge span{font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:1px}
    .hero-badge .v{color:var(--coral);font-weight:700}
    .hero h1{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:clamp(32px,8vw,96px);font-weight:700;color:var(--text);letter-spacing:-3px;line-height:.92;max-width:100%;overflow-wrap:break-word}
    .hero h1 .accent{color:var(--coral)}
    .hero-sub{font-size:14px;color:var(--text-gray);max-width:500px;line-height:1.7;width:100%;padding:0 8px}
    .hero-install{width:100%;max-width:min(600px,100%);background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;position:relative;transition:border-color .3s}
    .hero-install:hover{border-color:var(--coral)}
    .hero-install-prefix{padding:0 16px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-dim);flex-shrink:0;border-right:1px solid var(--border)}
    .hero-install-cmd{flex:1;padding:14px 16px;font-size:13px;color:var(--coral);font-family:var(--mono);white-space:nowrap;overflow-x:auto;letter-spacing:.3px;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;scrollbar-width:none}.hero-install-cmd::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
    .hero-install-copy{padding:12px 20px;background:var(--coral);border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--bg);letter-spacing:1px;transition:background .2s;flex-shrink:0}
    .hero-install-copy:hover{background:var(--orange)}
    .hero-install-copy.copied{background:var(--green)}
    .hero-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:32px}
    .hero-link{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:1px;transition:color .2s}
    .hero-link:hover{color:var(--coral)}
    .gh-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 14px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11px;color:var(--text);letter-spacing:.5px;transition:border-color .2s}
    .gh-badge:hover{border-color:var(--coral);color:var(--text)}
    .gh-badge svg{flex-shrink:0}
    .gh-star{color:var(--amber)}

    /* SOCIAL PROOF */
    .proof{scroll-snap-align:start;padding:64px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border-subtle);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-subtle);background:var(--surface)}
    .proof-grid{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:48px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .proof-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
    .proof-num{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:32px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
    .proof-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1.4}
    .proof-sep{width:1px;height:40px;background:var(--border)}
    .btn-primary{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:56px;padding:0 36px;background:var(--coral);border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s}
    .btn-primary span{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--bg);letter-spacing:.5px}
    .btn-primary:hover{background:var(--orange)}
    .btn-ghost{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:56px;padding:0 28px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s}
    .btn-ghost span{font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted)}
    .btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--text-gray)}

    /* TYPEWRITER */
    .tw-wrap{position:relative;display:inline-block;max-width:100%}.tw-ghost{visibility:hidden;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word}.tw-text{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;white-space:pre-wrap;word-break:break-word;max-width:100%}
    .tw-cursor{display:inline-block;width:.06em;height:.85em;background:currentColor;margin-left:2px;vertical-align:middle;animation:tw-blink .7s step-end infinite}
    @keyframes tw-blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0}}

    /* VIDEO */
    .video-wrap{margin-top:48px}
    .video-container{position:relative;width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer}
    .video-container iframe{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:none}
    .video-thumb{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:var(--bg);transition:opacity .3s}
    .video-thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;opacity:.6;transition:opacity .3s}
    .video-container:hover .video-thumb img{opacity:.4}
    .video-play{position:absolute;width:80px;height:80px;background:var(--coral);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:transform .3s,background .3s;z-index:2}
    .video-container:hover .video-play{transform:scale(1.1);background:var(--orange)}
    .video-play svg{margin-left:4px}
    .video-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:24px;margin-top:16px;flex-wrap:wrap}
    .video-stat{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:1px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
    .video-stat strong{color:var(--text);font-weight:700}

    /* DEMO */
    .demo-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin-top:32px}
    .demo-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .3s}.demo-card:hover{border-color:var(--border)}
    .demo-card-body{padding:24px}.demo-card-body h3{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:16px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px}.demo-card-body p{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)}
    .demo-card video{width:100%;height:auto;display:block}

    /* CASE STUDIES */
    .case-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:48px}
    .case-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);padding:32px;transition:border-color .3s}.case-card:hover{border-color:var(--border)}
    .case-score{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:48px;font-weight:700;line-height:1}.case-url{font-size:11px;color:var(--coral);letter-spacing:.5px;margin:8px 0}
    .case-stack{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:12px}
    .case-findings{list-style:none;padding:0}.case-findings li{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.6;padding:4px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border-subtle)}.case-findings li::before{content:">";color:var(--coral);margin-right:8px;font-weight:700}

    /* TESTIMONIALS */
    .test-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:48px}
    .test-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);padding:32px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;transition:border-color .3s}.test-card:hover{border-color:var(--border)}
    .test-quote{font-size:12px;color:var(--text-gray);line-height:1.7;font-style:italic}.test-author{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:auto}.test-src{font-size:9px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:1px}

    /* BENTO FEATURES */
    .bento{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:48px}
    .bento-card{background:var(--surface);padding:32px;border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);min-height:240px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;transition:border-color .3s}.bento-card:hover{border-color:var(--border)}
    .bento-card.highlight{background:var(--coral);border-color:var(--coral)}.bento-card.highlight .bento-title,.bento-card.highlight .bento-desc,.bento-card.highlight .bento-badge{color:var(--bg)}
    .bento-num{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:48px;font-weight:700;color:var(--coral);line-height:1}.bento-card.highlight .bento-num{color:var(--bg)}
    .bento-title{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:20px;font-weight:700}
    .bento-badge{display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border:1px solid;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;width:fit-content}
    .bento-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.6}

    /* STATS */
    .stats-bar{background:var(--coral);display:flex;align-items:center;scroll-snap-align:start}
    .stat-block{flex:1;padding:40px 32px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;border-right:2px solid var(--bg)}.stat-block:last-child{border-right:none}
    .stat-val{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:48px;font-weight:700;color:var(--bg);line-height:1}.stat-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#000;letter-spacing:2px}

    /* STEPS */
    .steps{display:flex;gap:2px;margin-top:48px}
    .step{flex:1;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:40px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;min-height:260px}
    .step-num{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:48px;font-weight:700;color:var(--coral)}.step-title{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:20px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase}.step-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.6}.step-desc code{font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--coral);font-size:10px}

    /* COMMANDS */
    .cmd-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;margin-top:48px}
    .cmd-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:16px;padding:16px 20px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);transition:border-color .3s}.cmd-row:hover{border-color:var(--border)}
    .cmd-row code{font-size:12px;color:var(--coral);white-space:nowrap;min-width:190px;font-weight:500}.cmd-row span{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)}

    /* SCORING */
    .score-wrap{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:48px;margin-top:48px}.score-bars{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px}
    .score-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}.score-name{width:165px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-gray);flex-shrink:0;letter-spacing:.5px}
    .score-track{flex:1;height:8px;background:var(--surface2);overflow:hidden}.score-fill{height:100%;transition:width 1.2s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);width:0}
    .score-val{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-dim);width:36px;text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;font-weight:700}
    .prio-stack{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
    .prio{padding:20px 24px;background:var(--surface);border-left:4px solid;transition:transform .3s}.prio:hover{transform:translateX(4px)}
    .prio-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:4px}.prio-desc{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted)}

    /* FAQ */
    .faq-list{margin-top:48px}.faq-item{border-top:1px solid var(--border-subtle)}
    .faq-q{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;width:100%;padding:20px 0;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;text-align:left;gap:16px;font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text)}
    .faq-toggle{width:32px;height:32px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--surface2);transition:all .2s}
    .faq-toggle.open{background:var(--coral);border-color:var(--coral)}
    .faq-toggle span{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-gray)}.faq-toggle.open span{color:var(--bg)}
    .faq-a{padding-bottom:24px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-gray);line-height:1.7;display:none}.faq-a.open{display:block}
    .faq-a a{text-decoration:underline;text-underline-offset:3px;text-decoration-color:rgba(224,120,80,.4)}

    /* ECO */
    .eco-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:48px}
    .eco-card{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);padding:32px;transition:border-color .3s}.eco-card:hover{border-color:var(--border)}
    .eco-card h3{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:18px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px}.eco-card p{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:16px}.eco-link{font-size:11px;color:var(--coral);letter-spacing:.5px}

    /* FINAL CTA */
    .final-cta{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:48px;padding:120px 24px;border-top:2px solid var(--coral);text-align:center;scroll-snap-align:start}
    .final-cta h2{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:clamp(28px,7vw,80px);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-2px;line-height:.95;max-width:100%;overflow-wrap:break-word}

    /* SPEED REPORT FEATURE (homepage teaser) */
    .sr-findings{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;margin:32px 0}
    .sr-find-tile{background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);padding:24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;min-height:120px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:background .25s ease,border-color .25s ease,transform .25s ease}
    .sr-find-tile::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;height:1px;width:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--coral),transparent);transition:left .6s ease}
    .sr-find-tile:hover{background:#161616;border-color:rgba(224,120,80,.35);transform:translateY(-2px)}
    .sr-find-tile:hover::before{left:100%}
    .sr-find-num{font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:36px;font-weight:700;color:var(--coral);line-height:1;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
    .sr-find-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase}
    .sr-find-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-gray);line-height:1.5;margin-top:auto}
    .race{margin:24px 0 8px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);padding:20px 22px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
    .race::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;height:1px;width:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--coral),transparent);animation:raceSweep 7s ease-in-out infinite}
    @keyframes raceSweep{0%,90%{left:-100%}45%{left:100%}100%{left:100%}}
    .race-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px}
    .race-title{color:var(--coral);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2.5px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
    .race-title::before{content:'';width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--coral);box-shadow:0 0 0 0 var(--coral);animation:srLiveDot 2.4s ease-in-out infinite}
    @keyframes srLiveDot{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(224,120,80,.55)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(224,120,80,0)}}
    .race-axis{position:relative;height:12px;margin-bottom:8px;margin-left:178px;margin-right:56px}
    .race-axis span{position:absolute;top:0;font-size:9px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:.5px}
    .race-axis span:nth-child(1){left:0}
    .race-axis span:nth-child(2){left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%)}
    .race-axis span:nth-child(3){left:90%;transform:translateX(-50%);color:var(--green)}
    .race-axis span:nth-child(4){right:0}
    .race-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
    .race-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:24px 142px 1fr 48px;gap:12px;align-items:center;padding:5px 0;font-family:var(--mono);transition:background .2s ease,opacity .35s ease,transform .35s ease}
    .race-row:hover{background:rgba(224,120,80,.04)}
    .race-row.is-collapsed{display:none}
    .race-row.is-pending{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}
    .race-rank{color:var(--text-dim);font-weight:700;text-align:right;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;font-size:11px}
    .race-name{color:var(--text);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.3px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;font-size:11px;transition:color .2s ease}
    .race-name .badge{display:inline-block;margin-left:6px;padding:1px 6px;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:1px;background:var(--green);color:var(--bg);font-weight:700;vertical-align:middle}
    .race-track{position:relative;height:14px;background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);overflow:hidden}
    .race-track::after{content:'';position:absolute;left:90%;top:0;bottom:0;width:1px;background:rgba(74,222,128,.4);pointer-events:none;z-index:2}
    .race-fill{position:absolute;inset:0;width:0;transform-origin:left center;transition:width 1.2s cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}
    .race-fill::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:0;bottom:0;width:30px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.18));pointer-events:none}
    .race-fill.tier-good{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#2c8c4d 0%,var(--green) 100%);box-shadow:0 0 14px -3px rgba(74,222,128,.45) inset}
    .race-fill.tier-mid{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#a37512 0%,var(--amber) 100%)}
    .race-fill.tier-bad{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#7a2c19 0%,var(--coral) 100%)}
    .race-row.in-view .race-fill{width:calc(var(--score,0) * 1%);transition-delay:calc(var(--idx,0) * 55ms)}
    .race-val{text-align:right;font-weight:700;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;font-size:13px;font-family:var(--grotesk)}
    .race-val.tier-good{color:var(--green)}
    .race-val.tier-mid{color:var(--amber)}
    .race-val.tier-bad{color:var(--coral)}
    .race-row.is-us .race-name{color:var(--green)}
    .race-row.is-us .race-track{border-color:rgba(74,222,128,.45);box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(74,222,128,.18)}
    .race-row:hover:not(.is-us) .race-name{color:var(--coral)}
    .race-more{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;width:100%;margin-top:10px;padding:13px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s ease,color .15s ease,background .2s ease}
    .race-more:hover{border-color:var(--coral);color:var(--coral);background:rgba(224,120,80,.04)}
    .race-more .arr{display:inline-block;transition:transform .25s ease}
    .race-more:hover .arr{transform:translateY(2px)}
    .race-more.is-open .arr{transform:rotate(180deg)}
    .race-foot{margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border-subtle);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:.5px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px}
    .race-legend{display:flex;gap:14px;align-items:center}
    .race-legend i{display:inline-block;width:10px;height:10px;margin-right:6px;vertical-align:middle}
    .race-legend .lg-good{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#2c8c4d,var(--green))}
    .race-legend .lg-mid{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#a37512,var(--amber))}
    .race-legend .lg-bad{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#7a2c19,var(--coral))}
    .race-legend .lg-pass{width:1px;height:12px;background:var(--green);opacity:.6;margin-right:6px}
    /* CHECK YOUR OWN SITE */
    .check-yours{margin:32px 0 0;padding:24px;background:var(--surface);border:1px solid var(--border);transition:border-color .25s ease,background .25s ease}
    .check-yours:hover{border-color:#3a3a3a;background:#141414}
    .cy-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--coral);letter-spacing:2.5px;margin-bottom:8px;text-transform:uppercase}
    .cy-blurb{font-size:13px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:16px;max-width:640px}
    .cy-form{display:flex;align-items:stretch;border:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg);transition:border-color .25s ease,box-shadow .25s ease;margin-bottom:8px}
    .cy-form:focus-within{border-color:var(--coral);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(224,120,80,.15)}
    .cy-prefix{padding:0 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-dim);background:var(--surface2);border-right:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;letter-spacing:.3px;transition:color .2s ease}
    .cy-form:focus-within .cy-prefix{color:var(--coral)}
    .cy-input{flex:1;min-width:0;background:transparent;border:none;outline:none;color:var(--coral);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;padding:14px 14px;letter-spacing:.3px}
    .cy-input::placeholder{color:var(--text-dim)}
    .cy-btn{background:var(--coral);color:var(--bg);border:none;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;padding:12px 24px;transition:background .15s ease;flex-shrink:0;white-space:nowrap;position:relative;overflow:hidden;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
    .cy-btn:hover{background:var(--orange)}
    .cy-btn:active{transform:translateY(1px)}
    .cy-btn .arr{display:inline-block;transition:transform .25s ease}
    .cy-btn:hover .arr{transform:translateX(4px)}
    .cy-btn::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:50%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.28),transparent);transition:left .7s ease}
    .cy-btn:hover::after{left:140%}
    .cy-hint{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:.5px;margin:0}
    .cy-hint a{color:var(--text-muted);text-decoration:underline;text-underline-offset:2px}
    .cy-hint a:hover{color:var(--coral)}

    /* CREDIBILITY CARDS */
    .cred-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:16px}
    .cred-card{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:18px;position:relative;transition:border-color .25s ease,transform .25s ease,box-shadow .35s ease}
    .cred-card:hover{border-color:rgba(224,120,80,.4);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 12px 32px -16px rgba(224,120,80,.35)}
    .cred-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding-bottom:14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-subtle)}
    .cred-tag{font-size:10px;color:var(--coral);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
    .cred-tag::before{content:'';width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--green);box-shadow:0 0 0 0 var(--green);animation:credLiveDot 2.4s ease-in-out infinite}
    @keyframes credLiveDot{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(74,222,128,.55)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 6px rgba(74,222,128,0)}}
    .cred-meta{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:.5px}
    .cred-foot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid var(--border-subtle);font-size:10px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:.5px;margin-top:auto}
    .cred-foot a{color:var(--coral);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-decoration:none;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:6px 10px;margin:-6px -10px;border:1px solid transparent;transition:border-color .2s ease,background .2s ease,color .15s ease}
    .cred-foot a .arr{display:inline-block;transition:transform .25s ease}
    .cred-foot a:hover{color:var(--orange);border-color:var(--coral);background:rgba(224,120,80,.08)}
    .cred-foot a:hover .arr{transform:translateX(3px)}
    .cred-source{color:var(--text-muted)}
    .cred-frame{margin:0;border:1px solid var(--border);background:#fff;overflow:hidden;position:relative;transition:border-color .3s ease,box-shadow .3s ease}
    .cred-frame:hover{border-color:rgba(224,120,80,.45);box-shadow:0 8px 28px -12px rgba(224,120,80,.35)}
    .frame-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:#1a1a1a;padding:8px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-subtle)}
    .frame-dot{width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:#444;flex-shrink:0}
    .frame-dot:first-child{background:#ff5f57}
    .frame-dot:nth-child(2){background:#febc2e}
    .frame-dot:nth-child(3){background:#28c840}
    .frame-url{margin-left:8px;flex:1;min-width:0;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);font-family:var(--mono);letter-spacing:.3px;background:#0f0f0f;padding:4px 10px;border:1px solid var(--border-subtle);overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
    .cred-frame img{display:block;width:100%;height:auto;background:#fff}
    .cred-frame::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 70%,rgba(0,0,0,.12));pointer-events:none}
    .cred-note{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.7;margin:0;letter-spacing:.2px}
    .cred-note strong{color:var(--green);font-weight:700;font-family:var(--grotesk);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}

    .sr-cta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:24px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px}
    .sr-cta-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:14px 24px;background:var(--coral);color:var(--bg);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-decoration:none;transition:background .2s ease,transform .2s ease;text-transform:uppercase}
    .sr-cta-link:hover{background:var(--orange);color:var(--bg)}
    .sr-cta-link:hover .arr{transform:translateX(4px)}
    .sr-cta-link .arr{display:inline-block;transition:transform .25s ease}
    .sr-cta-meta{font-size:10px;color:var(--text-dim);letter-spacing:.5px}
    @media(max-width:900px){.sr-findings{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}.cred-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
    @media(max-width:768px){
      .sr-findings{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px}
      .sr-find-tile{padding:18px 16px;min-height:auto}
      .sr-find-num{font-size:30px}
      .race{padding:18px 14px;margin:20px 0 8px}
      .race-head{font-size:9px;margin-bottom:10px}
      .race-head > span:not(.race-title){flex:1 0 100%;font-size:9px;line-height:1.4}
      .race-axis{margin-left:108px;margin-right:34px;height:10px;margin-bottom:6px}
      .race-axis span{font-size:8px}
      .race-row{grid-template-columns:18px 84px 1fr 30px;gap:8px;padding:5px 0}
      .race-rank{font-size:10px}
      .race-name{font-size:10px}
      .race-name .badge{display:none}
      .race-track{height:12px}
      .race-val{font-size:11px}
      .race-foot{font-size:9px;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;padding-top:10px;margin-top:10px}
      .race-legend{gap:10px 12px;flex-wrap:wrap}
      .race-legend i{width:8px;height:8px;margin-right:4px}
      .cred-card{padding:18px 14px;gap:14px}
      .cred-head{padding-bottom:10px;gap:8px}
      .cred-tag{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1.8px}
      .cred-meta{font-size:9px}
      .frame-bar{padding:6px 8px;gap:5px}
      .frame-dot{width:8px;height:8px}
      .frame-url{font-size:9px;padding:3px 8px}
      .cred-note{font-size:11px;line-height:1.6}
      .cred-foot{font-size:9px;padding-top:10px;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px}
      .cred-foot a{margin:0;padding:0}
      .check-yours{padding:18px 14px;margin-top:24px}
      .cy-label{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1.8px}
      .cy-blurb{font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:12px}
      .cy-form{flex-direction:column}
      .cy-prefix{padding:8px 12px;border-right:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:11px;justify-content:flex-start}
      .cy-input{padding:12px 14px;font-size:14px}
      .cy-btn{padding:14px 18px;width:100%;justify-content:center}
      .cy-hint{font-size:9px;line-height:1.5}
      .sr-cta{flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;text-align:center;gap:10px;margin-top:20px}
      .sr-cta-link{justify-content:center;padding:14px 18px;width:100%}
      .sr-cta-meta{font-size:9px}
    }
    @media(max-width:480px){
      .sr-findings{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1px}
      .sr-find-tile{padding:14px 12px;min-height:auto}
      .sr-find-num{font-size:24px}
      .sr-find-label{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:1.2px}
      .sr-find-sub{font-size:10px}
      .race{padding:14px 10px}
      .race-axis{margin-left:78px;margin-right:28px}
      .race-axis span{font-size:7px}
      .race-row{grid-template-columns:14px 60px 1fr 26px;gap:6px}
      .race-rank{font-size:9px}
      .race-name{font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.2px}
      .race-track{height:10px}
      .race-val{font-size:10px}

    <div class="wrap" style="max-width:800px">
      <h2 style="font-family:var(--grotesk);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--coral);letter-spacing:2px;margin-bottom:16px">ABOUT CLAUDE SEO</h2>
      <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px">Claude SEO is a free, open-source AI SEO audit tool built for Claude Code. It is an alternative to paid SEO platforms like Ahrefs, Semrush, and SE Ranking. Instead of a browser-based dashboard, Claude SEO runs in your terminal. You type <code style="color:var(--coral)">/seo audit</code> and 9 AI agents analyze your website in parallel, producing a 0-100 SEO health score with a prioritized action plan.</p>
      <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px">The tool covers 18 SEO disciplines: technical SEO (crawlability, indexability, security, URL structure, mobile, Core Web Vitals with INP, structured data, JavaScript rendering, IndexNow), content quality (E-E-A-T per the September 2025 Quality Rater Guidelines), Schema.org markup detection and JSON-LD generation, Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Bing Copilot, local SEO (Google Business Profile, NAP consistency, citations, reviews, map pack), maps intelligence, image optimization, XML sitemap analysis, programmatic SEO, competitor comparison pages, international SEO with hreflang and DACH/FR/ES/JA cultural profiles, strategic planning, semantic topic clustering via SERP overlap analysis, search experience optimization (SXO), SEO drift monitoring with SQLite baselines, and e-commerce SEO with product schema and Google Shopping intelligence.</p>
      <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:16px">Claude SEO auto-detects 5 business types (SaaS, local service, e-commerce, publisher, agency) and tailors recommendations to your industry. It integrates with MCP servers including official Ahrefs and Semrush APIs. Optional extensions add live SERP data via DataForSEO and AI image generation via Google Gemini.</p>
      <p style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-muted);line-height:1.8">MIT licensed. 7,000+ GitHub stars. 1,091 forks. 31,000+ YouTube demo views. Works on macOS, Linux, and Windows. Requires Python 3.10+ and Claude Code CLI. Claude SEO runs entirely on your local machine through Claude Code. No data is sent to external servers unless you use optional MCP extensions.   <script>
    /* YouTube lazy load */
    function loadVideo(){var c=document.getElementById('ytPlayer');var t=document.getElementById('ytThumb');var f=document.createElement('iframe');f.setAttribute('src','https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/COMnNlUakQk?autoplay=1&rel=0');f.setAttribute('allow','accelerometer;autoplay;clipboard-write;encrypted-media;gyroscope;picture-in-picture');f.setAttribute('allowfullscreen','');f.setAttribute('title','Claude Code Just Replaced Your Entire SEO Stack - 12 skills Demo');c.appendChild(f);t.style.opacity='0';t.style.pointerEvents='none';c.style.cursor='default';c.onclick=null}

    function toggleMenu(){document.getElementById('burger').classList.toggle('open');document.getElementById('mobileDrawer').classList.toggle('open')}
    function closeMenu(){document.getElementById('burger').classList.remove('open');document.getElementById('mobileDrawer').classList.remove('open')}
    function copyHero(){var text='git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-seo.git && bash claude-seo/install.sh';var btn=document.getElementById('heroCopy');if(!btn)return;navigator.clipboard.writeText(text).then(function(){btn.textContent='COPIED';btn.classList.add('copied');setTimeout(function(){btn.textContent='COPY';btn.classList.remove('copied')},2000)}).catch(function(){btn.textContent='SELECT CMD';setTimeout(function(){btn.textContent='COPY'},2000)})}

    function toggleFaq(btn){var item=btn.parentElement;var a=item.querySelector('.faq-a');var tog=item.querySelector('.faq-toggle');var isOpen=a.classList.contains('open');
      var allBtns=document.querySelectorAll('.faq-q');for(var i=0;i<allBtns.length;i++){allBtns[i].setAttribute('aria-expanded','false')}
      var allA=document.querySelectorAll('.faq-a.open');for(var i=0;i<allA.length;i++){allA[i].classList.remove('open');var t=allA[i].parentElement.querySelector('.faq-toggle');t.classList.remove('open');t.querySelector('span').textContent='+'}
      if(!isOpen){a.classList.add('open');tog.classList.add('open');tog.querySelector('span').textContent='-';btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded','true')}}

    /* TYPEWRITER (GlitchText port) */
    ;(function(){
      var obs=new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){entries.forEach(function(entry){if(!entry.isIntersecting)return;var el=entry.target;if(el.getAttribute('data-tw-done'))return;el.setAttribute('data-tw-done','1');obs.unobserve(el);
        var text=el.getAttribute('data-text');var speed=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-speed'))||40;var delay=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-delay'))||0;
        var ghost=document.createElement('span');ghost.className='tw-ghost';ghost.textContent=text;
        var overlay=document.createElement('span');overlay.className='tw-text';overlay.setAttribute('aria-live','polite');
        el.classList.add('tw-wrap');el.textContent='';el.appendChild(ghost);el.appendChild(overlay);
        setTimeout(function(){var idx=0;var iv=setInterval(function(){idx++;overlay.textContent=text.slice(0,idx);
          var cur=overlay.querySelector('.tw-cursor');if(!cur){cur=document.createElement('span');cur.className='tw-cursor';overlay.appendChild(cur)}
          if(idx>=text.length){clearInterval(iv);setTimeout(function(){var c=overlay.querySelector('.tw-cursor');if(c)c.remove()},800)}
        },speed)},delay)})},{threshold:0.2});
      var els=document.querySelectorAll('.tw-auto');for(var i=0;i<els.length;i++)obs.observe(els[i])
    })();

    /* NAVBAR */
    ;(function(){
      var nav=document.getElementById('navbar');var lc=document.getElementById('navLinks');
      var sections=['demo','features','commands'];
      var links=lc.querySelectorAll('.nav-link');
      // Smooth scroll for anchor links only
      links.forEach(function(link){var href=link.getAttribute('href');if(href.startsWith('#')){link.addEventListener('click',function(e){e.preventDefault();var target=document.querySelector(href);if(target)target.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})})}});
      window.addEventListener('scroll',function(){nav.classList.toggle('scrolled',window.scrollY>24)},{passive:true});
      // Active state for anchor-linked sections only
      var anchorLinks=Array.from(links).filter(function(l){return l.getAttribute('href').startsWith('#')});
      sections.forEach(function(id,idx){var el=document.getElementById(id);if(!el||!anchorLinks[idx])return;
        new IntersectionObserver(function(e){if(e[0].isIntersecting){for(var j=0;j<links.length;j++)links[j].classList.remove('active');anchorLinks[idx].classList.add('active')}},{rootMargin:'-35% 0px -60% 0px'}).observe(el)})
    })();

    /* VIDEO LAZY LOAD */
    ;(function(){var vobs=new IntersectionObserver(function(entries){entries.forEach(function(e){if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.preload='auto';vobs.unobserve(e.target)}})},{threshold:0.1});document.querySelectorAll('video[preload="none"]').forEach(function(v){vobs.observe(v)})})();

    /* SCORE BARS */
    ;(function(){var sb=document.getElementById('scoreBars');if(!sb)return;
      new IntersectionObserver(function(e){if(e[0].isIntersecting){var fills=sb.querySelectorAll('.score-fill');for(var i=0;i<fills.length;i++){fills[i].style.width=fills[i].getAttribute('data-w')+'%'}}},{threshold:0.3}).observe(sb)
    })();

    /* SPEED REPORT race chart - animate fills on view */
    ;(function(){var race=document.getElementById('srRace');if(!race||!('IntersectionObserver' in window)){if(race){race.querySelectorAll('.race-row').forEach(function(r){r.classList.add('in-view')})}return}
      new IntersectionObserver(function(e){if(!e[0].isIntersecting)return;
        race.querySelectorAll('.race-row').forEach(function(r){r.classList.add('in-view')});
      },{threshold:0.2}).observe(race)
    })();

    /* CHECK YOUR OWN SITE - deep-link to PageSpeed Insights */
    function checkMySite(evt){
      evt.preventDefault();
      var raw=(document.getElementById('cyInput').value||'').trim();
      if(!raw)return;
      raw=raw.replace(/^https?:\/\//i,'').replace(/^\/+/,'').replace(/\s+/g,'');
      var clean='https://'+raw;
      if(!/^https:\/\/[^.]+\.[^.]+/.test(clean)){
        var form=document.querySelector('#checkYours .cy-form');
        if(form){form.style.borderColor='var(--rose)';setTimeout(function(){form.style.borderColor=''},1500)}
        document.getElementById('cyInput').focus();
        return;
      }
      var url='https://pagespeed.web.dev/report?url='+encodeURIComponent(clean)+'&form_factor=mobile';
      window.open(url,'_blank','noopener,noreferrer');
    }
